results.rendered_html:
uttapta p. p.
1 Burnt, heated, seared, made red-hot. ˚kanaka  K. 43 , 36 ;  U. 5. 14. 
2 Bathed, washed.
3 Anxious.
4 Enraged, inflamed, fired;  Ve. 2. 
— ptaṃ
1 Dried flesh.
2 Great heat.
